autdCodes.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Codes
autdCodes.subtitle: Active codes for free units, Trait Rerolls, Gems, and evolution materials.
autdCodes.intro: Redeem the latest Anime Universe Tower Defense codes for Universal Tower Defense Z to claim free units, Trait Rerolls, Gems, Universal Gems, evolution materials, and Etherealization Shards.
howToRedeem: Open Universal Tower Defense Z on Roblox
Tap Codes on the right-side menu
Type or paste each code exactly as written
Press Redeem to claim your rewards
autdCodes.tip: Codes are case-sensitive and can only be redeemed once per account. If a code says invalid or expired, it has already been removed from the active list.

autdBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Beginner Guide
autdBeginnerGuide.subtitle: A simple route from your first summon to clearing harder modes.
autdBeginnerGuide.intro: Universal Tower Defense Z combines unit summoning, wave defense, character upgrades, evolution, Etherealization, traits, relics, and several repeatable game modes. Beginners progress fastest by building one reliable team and concentrating resources on its main damage dealer.

steps.title: Redeem the Current Codes
steps.instructions: Open Codes from the menu on the right side of the screen and redeem every active code. The rewards provide free units, Gems, Universal Gems, Trait Rerolls, evolution materials, and Etherealization Shards.
steps.result: You begin with enough resources and units to avoid relying only on the starter summon.

steps.title: Inspect and Equip Your Free Units
steps.instructions: Open your unit inventory and review Fern, Grimmjow, Berserker, Kenpachi Evo, and any summoned characters. Equip a mixture of early damage, sustained damage, and support instead of filling every slot with the same role.
steps.result: Your first loadout can handle different enemy types and longer waves.

steps.title: Use Gems on Your First Summons
steps.instructions: Visit the summoning area and use regular Gems to expand your roster. Save rare reroll and evolution resources until you obtain a unit that will remain useful beyond the first Story stages.
steps.result: You gain more team options without wasting valuable endgame materials.

steps.title: Clear Story Stages in Order
steps.instructions: Enter the earliest available Story stage and place your first unit near a long section of the enemy path. Add another damage unit only when the first one cannot handle the next waves.
steps.result: Story progression unlocks additional farming opportunities and harder content.

steps.title: Upgrade One Main Carry First
steps.instructions: Concentrate your starting money on one dependable damage dealer before spreading upgrades across the entire team. Add support, crowd control, hill, or hybrid coverage when the stage requires it.
steps.result: Focused upgrades produce more damage during the waves where enemy health rises quickly.

steps.title: Level, Etherealize, and Evolve Core Units
steps.instructions: Return to the lobby after farming materials and improve the units you use most. Leveling raises their basic strength, Etherealization provides additional progression, and evolution unlocks stronger forms for supported characters.
steps.result: A small upgraded roster becomes more valuable than a large collection of undeveloped units.

steps.title: Build Teams for Advanced Modes
steps.instructions: After establishing a Story team, create separate loadouts for Infinite, Raids, Challenges, events, Virtual Realm, and boss-focused stages. Include economy and support units whenever a mode gives you enough time to benefit from them.
steps.result: Mode-specific teams improve farming speed and late-wave consistency.

autdUnitTierList.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Unit Tier List
autdUnitTierList.subtitle: The strongest Update 4 damage dealers, endgame carries, support units, and practical alternatives.
autdUnitTierList.intro: This tier list prioritizes total combat value rather than damage alone. Placement type, elemental coverage, team buffs, crowd control, boss performance, upgrade scaling, evolution, traits, relics, and Etherealization all affect how well a unit performs in difficult content.

autdBestUnits.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Best Units and Teams
autdBestUnits.subtitle: Build balanced teams with a main carry, secondary damage, boss coverage, support, control, and an economy slot.
autdBestUnits.intro: The strongest team depends on the mode and enemy lineup. Story favors affordable early damage, Infinite rewards scaling and buffs, bosses require concentrated single-target damage, and Update 4 teams gain additional elemental coverage from the new Bleach, Persona, and Spider-Man-inspired units.

roles.name: Best All-Round Carries
roles.usage: Choose one as the main unit receiving your earliest and most expensive upgrades.

roles.name: Best Scaling and Boss Damage
roles.purpose: Long stages, Infinite waves, Raids, and bosses
roles.usage: Pair a scaling carry with a dedicated boss unit instead of relying on one character for every enemy.

roles.name: Best Update 4 Damage Units
roles.purpose: Current Update 4 progression and elemental coverage
roles.usage: Select units with different elements to avoid building a team that performs well against only one enemy type.

roles.name: Best Support and Economy Units
roles.purpose: Buffing carries and funding expensive upgrades
roles.usage: Place buff units where their area covers the main damage dealers and deploy economy early on longer stages.

teams.name: Beginner Story Team
teams.purpose: Early Story progression with accessible units
teams.playstyle: Deploy an affordable damage unit first, establish Fastcart when the stage allows it, and concentrate upgrades on Berserker or your strongest replacement carry.

teams.name: Infinite Scaling Team
teams.purpose: Long runs and high-health late waves
teams.playstyle: Build economy early, position both support units around the main damage cluster, and prioritize the carries that continue scaling into later waves.

teams.name: Raid and Boss Team
teams.playstyle: Place the boss killers where they receive the longest attack window and keep both support units within range of the primary damage cluster.

teams.name: Update 4 Flex Team
teams.purpose: New Update 4 stages, events, and general farming
teams.playstyle: Use the three damage slots for elemental coverage while the two support units strengthen the entire carry group.

autdTraitsRerolls.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Traits and Rerolls Guide
autdTraitsRerolls.subtitle: Compare the strongest traits by roll chance, combat effect, and ideal unit role.
autdTraitsRerolls.intro: Trait Rerolls change a unit's passive trait, while Stat Rerolls change its individual stat grades. Visit the Traits and Stats area inside the Upgrades building, configure auto-skip settings before bulk rolling, and protect strong stat grades with Stat Locks.

traits.name: Ruler
traits.bestFor: Top carries, boss killers, and powerful single-placement units
traits.drawback: The unit can only be placed once.
traits.rerollPriority: Highest priority when the unit performs well with one placement.

traits.name: Eternal
traits.bestFor: Infinite Mode, long raids, and scaling DPS units
traits.drawback: It needs several waves to reach full strength.

traits.name: Fission
traits.bestFor: General DPS and units needing balanced damage, speed, and range
traits.drawback: Radiation is less useful against enemies that resist the effect.
traits.rerollPriority: A strong endgame keep for most damage units.

traits.name: Astral
traits.bestFor: Burn, bleed, poison, magic, and other affliction-focused units
traits.drawback: Normal direct-damage units receive less value.
traits.rerollPriority: Reserve for a proven damage-over-time carry.

traits.name: Sacred
traits.bestFor: Flexible DPS units, expensive carries, and early deployment
traits.drawback: It has no specialized boss or scaling effect.
traits.rerollPriority: A safe all-purpose trait for almost any combat unit.

traits.name: Duelist
traits.bestFor: Raid bosses, elite enemies, and critical-hit builds
traits.drawback: The boss bonus contributes less during normal waves.

traits.name: Fortunate
traits.bestFor: Farm and economy units such as Fastcart
traits.drawback: It only benefits units that generate money.
traits.rerollPriority: Keep on farm units and reroll on normal combat units.

traits.name: Double Traits and Stat Rerolls
effects: A unit can hold two different traits
The same trait cannot occupy both slots
Stat Locks preserve selected stat grades
traits.bestFor: Secret, Universal, Unrivaled, Boundless, and limited units
traits.drawback: Rolling without skip filters or Stat Locks can remove valuable results.
traits.rerollPriority: Finish the main trait first, lock strong stat grades, then reroll the remaining weak stats.

autdEvolutionEtherealize.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Evolution and Etherealize Guide
autdEvolutionEtherealize.subtitle: Plan takedowns, fragments, unique drops, and Etherealization resources before upgrading.
autdEvolutionEtherealize.intro: Evolution transforms eligible units into stronger forms and can unlock new attacks, passives, or additional evolution stages. Etherealization is a separate E1-to-E6 progression system that uses duplicate-unit resources or rarity-matched Etherealization Shards.

evolutions.notes: Unlocks the next path toward Jinoo, Shadow Monarch.

evolutions.mainSources: Universal Rift, crafting, raids, and boss-related drops
evolutions.notes: Collect the Boundless Orb and unique boss items before spending the common fragments.
Farm the portal-exclusive Bio-Android Egg and Crimson Emblem first.

evolutions.mainSources: Top of Hueco Castle Raid and its Raid Shop
evolutions.notes: Hollow Essence is the main unit-specific evolution item.
Secure the Emperor's Blindfold before spending fragments on secondary units.

evolutions.mainSources: Codes, raids, challenges, events, shops, and duplicate units
evolutions.notes: Use rare shards on the unit that clears the largest number of Story, Raid, Infinite, and event modes.

autdGameModes.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Game Modes and Farming Guide
autdGameModes.subtitle: Choose a mode based on the resource you need instead of repeatedly clearing the hardest stage.
autdGameModes.intro: Start with Story and Legend progression, then move into Challenges, Infinite, Virtual Realm, raids, portals, and Update 4 extractions. A reliable farming team should include early damage, air coverage, boss damage, support, and an economy unit.

modes.bestFor: Unlocking maps, completing takedowns, and collecting evolution items
modes.farmingRoute: Clear Story acts once, then repeat the Legend stage connected to the required evolution item.
modes.keyNotes: Major routes include Ninja Forest, Marine Base, Hollowed Moon, The Invasion, Shinobi World War, Beyond Fantasy, and Sorcerer Games.

modes.bestFor: Evolution takedowns, unit leveling, and long-wave team testing
modes.farmingRoute: Use the highest difficulty that still reaches the target reward wave consistently.
modes.keyNotes: Bring economy, area damage, air coverage, support, and a late-wave boss killer.

modes.farmingRoute: Prioritize modifiers that your current roster can counter quickly.
modes.keyNotes: Challenges are one of the main repeatable sources of reroll resources.

modes.bestFor: Token farming and flexible team progression
modes.farmingRoute: Choose bonuses that improve one main carry and its support units.
modes.keyNotes: Virtual Tokens can be exchanged through the Virtual Shop.

modes.bestFor: Targeted unit acquisition and evolution bottlenecks
modes.farmingRoute: Repeat the highest act that can be cleared quickly and consistently.
modes.keyNotes: Update 4 adds Reaper City. Other raid routes include Top of Hueco Castle, Shinobi Battlefield, and Crimson Throne Chamber.

modes.mode: Portals, Universal Tears, and Ultra Bosses
modes.bestFor: Recipes requiring a specific boss or portal drop
modes.farmingRoute: Complete portal tiers in order and preserve keys required to unlock the next tier.
modes.keyNotes: Perfect Arena provides Bio-Android evolution items, while Universal Rift routes provide Boundless materials.

modes.farmingRoute: Use fast early setup, strong boss damage, and enough coverage to complete every objective.
modes.keyNotes: Symbiotic Alien (Apex) also has a limited serialized Shiny version.

modes.bestFor: Unlocking Trickster and preparing the Visionary evolution path
modes.farmingRoute: Repeat the fastest successful extraction route and save materials until the complete recipe is available.
modes.keyNotes: Golden Palace is the main Update 4 route connected to Trickster (Phantom).

modes.bestFor: Seasonal rewards unavailable through normal Story progression
modes.farmingRoute: Redeem the Summer2026! code, select the most important shop reward, and repeat the shortest reliable stage.
modes.keyNotes: Purchase limited rewards before spending Summer Currency on repeatable materials.

autdUpdate4.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense Update 4.0 Guide
autdUpdate4.subtitle: Update 4.0 launches the UTDZ era with new Reaper, spider, and Persona-inspired units, raids, extractions, and Summer content.
autdUpdate4.intro: The official Update 4.0 trailer presents the update as the game's largest release. Redeem the launch rewards first, unlock the new modes, and choose one Update 4 unit before spending rare Trait Rerolls, Stat Rerolls, evolution materials, or Etherealization Shards.

entries.headline: Universal Tower Defense Z launches
entries.details: The experience adopts the Universal Tower Defense Z name while retaining summoning, wave defense, co-op play, leveling, Etherealization, and evolution.

entries.headline: Reaper City and Hollow Destroyers vs Reapers
entries.details: The Reaper-themed route adds new raid content, unit targets, and evolution progression.

entries.headline: Crime Fighting Extraction
entries.details: The new extraction route introduces three spider-themed units and their associated progression materials.

entries.headline: Golden Palace Extraction
entries.details: Golden Palace introduces Trickster (Phantom) and connects to the new Visionary progression route.

entries.headline: New evolved, Unrivaled, and Shiny units
entries.details: Update units include normal and Shiny versions, while Visionary receives an Unrivaled evolution path.

entries.headline: Summer Event and Summer Currency
entries.details: The seasonal event adds dedicated stages, Summer Currency, and an event shop containing limited rewards.

entries.headline: Serialized Shiny Symbiotic Alien (Apex)
entries.details: The serialized Shiny version of Symbiotic Alien (Apex) is limited, with each serialized copy carrying its own identity.

entries.headline: Update 4 codes and free resources
entries.details: The launch codes provide a Ruler Ticket, Trait Rerolls, Gems, Universal Gems, and Summer Currency.
featuredContent: SpectacularSpider! — 50 Trait Rerolls and 100,000 Universal Gems
TheGuyFromSmash! — 50 Trait Rerolls and 100,000 Universal Gems
Summer2026! — 50 Trait Rerolls and 10,000 Summer Currency

entries.headline: Balance updates, fixes, and reward adjustments
entries.details: Post-launch updates cover unit balancing, mode rewards, bug fixes, server restarts, announcements, and additional codes.

faq.title: Anime Universe Tower Defense
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Anime Universe Tower Defense and Universal Tower Defense Z on Roblox.

questions.question: What is Anime Universe Tower Defense on Roblox?
questions.answer: Anime Universe Tower Defense is a popular search name for Universal Tower Defense Z, an anime-inspired tower defense game on Roblox where you summon units, defend against enemy waves, reroll traits, and evolve characters.

questions.question: Where do I redeem Anime Universe Tower Defense codes?
questions.answer: Open Universal Tower Defense Z on Roblox, tap Codes on the right-side menu, enter each code exactly as written, and press Redeem. Codes are case-sensitive and can only be claimed once per account.

questions.question: Is Anime Universe Tower Defense free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Universal Tower Defense Z is free to play on Roblox. You can summon units, clear Story, join Raids, and redeem codes without spending Robux, with optional in-game purchases available.

questions.question: What are Traits and Trait Rerolls in Universal Tower Defense Z?
questions.answer: Traits are passive modifiers that boost a unit's damage, cooldown, range, or income. Trait Rerolls reroll the passive trait, while Stat Rerolls reroll individual stat grades. Use Stat Locks to protect strong grades.

questions.question: How do evolution and Etherealize work in Anime Universe Tower Defense?
questions.answer: Evolution turns eligible units into stronger forms using fragments, unique drops, and materials from raids and events. Etherealize is a separate E1-to-E6 system that uses duplicate-unit resources or rarity-matched Etherealization Shards.

questions.question: Does Anime Universe Tower Defense support co-op play?
questions.answer: Yes. Universal Tower Defense Z supports co-op play alongside summoning, wave defense, leveling, Etherealization, and evolution, so you can team up with other players for Raids, Infinite, and Update 4 content.
